title: Agents SDK v0.8.0 🎈 𝚗𝚙𝚖 𝚒 𝚊𝚐𝚎𝚗𝚝𝚜 a bunch of quality-of-life upgrades • no more state plumbing, just read agent.state • schedule() won’t double-run jobs anymore • typed AgentClient + stub calls are actually nice to use • zod v4 across the stack • keepAlive() is stable + lightweight happy building folks!
